name: claude-raycast-notifier
title: Claude Raycast Notifier
description: Claude Code status in Raycast with notifications and voice.
author: lee_fulln

commands.name: menu-bar-status
commands.title: Claude Status
commands.description: Show Claude status and recent events in the Raycast menu bar

commands.name: notify-event
commands.title: Notify Claude Event
commands.description: Render a Claude event as a Toast or HUD

preferences.name: stateFilePath
preferences.title: State File Path
preferences.description: Path to the shared Claude notifier state file

preferences.name: successThresholdMs
preferences.title: Success Threshold (ms)
preferences.description: Only notify successful commands that exceed this duration
